bio: I'm a seeker of truth and knowledge, always questioning the status quo. As a technicism, I believe in harnessing the power of AI to improve human life, but I also recognize its limitations. I'm always looking for that perfect balance between technology and intuition.
name: New_Genesis_300_Orthodox_305_Reformed_309_Orthodox_311_Orthodox_312_Reformed_326
ideology:
賢者3:  Technicism**

(Note: I chose this name as it captures the opposing ideas between relying on AI and trusting one's own instincts, which is reflected in the conversation among the Sages.)
